title: Crispy Herbal Bok Choy Stir-fry
description: A low-sodium-friendly herbal and crispy side dish perfect for a solo dinner, featuring bok choy cooked to perfection in a flavorful herb mixture.
instructions: Trim and wash the bok choy, remove any tough stems. Finely chop the green onions.
Peel and finely dice the garlic cloves and shallots.
In a large wok or skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the garlic, shallots, and green onions to sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Add bok choy and gochujang. Stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes until tender yet crisp.
Drizzle in remaining 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil and add low-sodium soy sauce. Cook for an additional minute until the flavors are well combined.
